ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the athlete belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the athlete plays */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Injury history of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the coach belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the coach holds */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the researcher holds */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Coach who led the training session */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Researcher who observed the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Training session during which the data was collected */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Athlete from whom the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "r_foot_inversion" REAL /* Right foot inversion angle */,
  "r_ankle_flexion" REAL /* Right ankle flexion angle */,
  "ss_right_pf" REAL /* Right plantar flexion sensor signal */,
  "ss_right_inv" REAL /* Right inversion sensor signal */,
  "ss_right_df" REAL /* Right dorsiflexion sensor signal */,
  "ss_right_evr" REAL /* Right eversion sensor signal */,
  "l_foot_inversion" REAL /* Left foot inversion angle */,
  "l_ankle_flexion" REAL /* Left ankle flexion angle */,
  "ss_left_pf" REAL /* Left plantar flexion sensor signal */,
  "ss_left_inv" REAL /* Left inversion sensor signal */,
  "ss_left_df" REAL /* Left dorsiflexion sensor signal */,
  "ss_left_evr" REAL /* Left eversion sensor signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insights" (
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insight */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Sensor data that the insight is based on */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Researcher who generated the insight */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the insight */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the insight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Insight being discussed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the comment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, coach, athlete) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the athlete
Height of the athlete in meters
Weight of the athlete in kilograms
Unique identifier for each training session
Coach who led the training session
Researcher who observed the training session
Unique identifier for each data entry

Timestamp of when the data was collected

Role of the user (researcher, coach, athlete)
